CREATE TABLE test_uuids (id UUID, default_id UUID) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_uuids VALUES (CAST('61f0c404-5cb3-11e7-907b-a6006ad3dba0' AS UUID), CAST('59f0c404-5cb3-11e7-907b-a6006ad3dba0' AS UUID));
INSERT INTO test_uuids VALUES (CAST('-----invalid-uuid-----' AS UUID), CAST('59f0c404-5cb3-11e7-907b-a6006ad3dba0' AS UUID));
SELECT toUUIDOrDefault(id, CAST('e3b0c442-98fc-1c149afbf4c8996cb983c1c3' AS UUID)) AS converted_uuid FROM test_uuids WHERE id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT toUUIDOrDefault(CAST(NULL AS String), CAST('dc0a22c8-3ff3-4ed8-b8d3-b23766f477e3' AS UUID));

SELECT id, toUUIDOrDefault(CAST(NULL AS String), default_id) AS result FROM test_uuids WHERE id = '61f0c404-5cb3-11e7-907b-a6006ad3dba0' UNION SELECT id, toUUIDOrDefault('-----invalid-uuid-----', default_id) FROM test_uuids;
WITH CAST('61f0c404-5cb3-11e7-907b-a6006ad3dba0' AS UUID) AS valid_uuid, CAST('59f0c404-5cb3-11e7-907b-a6006ad3dba0' AS UUID) AS default_uuid SELECT toUUIDOrDefault(valid_uuid, default_uuid);
WITH ARRAY(SELECT CAST('61f0c404-5cb3-11e7-907b-a6006ad3dba0' AS UUID) AS val) AS uuids SELECT toUUIDOrDefault(uuids[1], CAST('59f0c404-5cb3-11e7-907b-a6006ad3dba0' AS UUID));
CREATE TABLE backup_uuids AS SELECT toUUIDOrDefault(id, default_id) AS converted_uuid FROM test_uuids;
